## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy's marketing strategy and prepare for the upcoming GrowthX kickoff meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is focusing on their Express Motion package ($40K) as the primary offering](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [New website launch expected on Friday, with emphasis on AEO/GEO optimization for product pages](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting towards answering specific analyst questions and creating in-depth, ungated resources](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide value through advanced research methods (e.g., Reddit scraping) and multi-channel content repurposing](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)

## Topics

### Current Marketing Focus and Priorities

  - [Express Motion package ($40K) is the primary focus](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Professional package (PLG motion) launching in December](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)
  - [Marketing channels prioritized into tiers based on opportunity and feasibility](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [AEO/GEO optimization for product pages is a top priority](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Cold outreach and trade shows remain important for enterprise audience](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Shift from gated content to ungated, in-depth resources](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focus on answering specific analyst questions related to AI data prep and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Potential for creating benchmarks, reports, and white papers as ungated AEO/GEO/SEO plays](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Need for content to fuel multiple channels (social, founder brand, community)](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

### SEO and Content Challenges

  - [Raj (likely a founder or executive) skeptical about traditional SEO content](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Perception that SEO is slow and hasn't yielded significant results](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Focus on short-term growth due to startup constraints and future funding considerations](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Need to balance immediate revenue-generating activities with long-term organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

### GrowthX's Potential Value-Add

  - [Advanced research methods (e.g., Reddit scraping) to uncover relevant questions and topics](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Multi-channel content repurposing to maximize value from existing materials](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Assistance with AEO/GEO optimization for the new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Potential support for technical SEO and site migration issues](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

### Upcoming Website Launch and Implications

  - [New Prophecy.ai site expected to go live on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Opportunity for low-hanging fruit optimization suggestions post-launch](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Potential technical SEO and core web vitals issues to address](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to plan a blended approach for the kickoff meeting, combining "ask and learn" with "show and tell"](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [Cody to share additional materials and brain dumps with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Monitor the new Prophecy.ai website launch on Friday](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare optimization suggestions for the new website](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1769.0)
  - [Consider potential technical SEO support for website migration issues](https://fathom.video/share/pyPepJqjwUujpsNNEY6At7xYMh4mbZV6?tab=summary&timestamp=1818.0)
